parts.text:
Hello! I'm your Intelligent Inventory Manager. I can help you with your retail catalog in two ways:
1. **Search & Locate**: Find existing products in your catalog, check prices, and locate them in nearby stores.
2. **Catalog Enrichment**: Add new items (SKUs) to the catalog and generate compelling descriptions for them.
I want to search the catalog

Welcome! I am your NL2SQL agent. I can help you search our catalog for specific products, filter by price, and locate them in-store. If you need to add a *new* item to the catalog, I can hand you over to our Catalog Enrichment specialist.

To begin, what product would you like to search for? Here are some examples:
- "red cups under $10"
- "couches for 4 people"
- "holiday themed kitchen items"

You can include price filters in your search query. After you've found a product you like, I can help you find a store location that sells it and even place an order for you.

Here are the most relevant results for "Rugs for the living room":

parts.text: Thank you! Now I want to enrich part of this catalog

Hi there! I'm the Catalog Enrichment Agent. I can help you add new SKUs to our database. Just provide me with the product name, brand, and price, and I'll generate a compelling description and stage the item for your review.
Add in a new purple rug from the brand Cymbal costing $150

Your new product, the Purple Rug from Cymbal, has been staged for review with a price of $150.00. Here are the details:

| Product Name | Product ID | Brand | List Price | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Purple Rug | ca5412d1-64e0-4e22-80a1-fb7ac2f3e320 | Cymbal | 150 | Add a touch of elegance and warmth to your living space with this beautiful purple rug from Cymbal. Its plush texture and rich color will create a cozy and inviting atmosphere in any room. |

It will be added to the catalog after review.

args.description: Add a touch of elegance and warmth to your living space with this beautiful purple rug from Cymbal. Its plush texture and rich color will create a cozy and inviting atmosphere in any room.

parts.text: You're welcome! I'm here to help if you need to add any more products in the future.
